records.question: Which recipes have nutrition information with calories exactly 90.22 and also have recorded quantity details?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT recipe.recipe_id FROM recipe
JOIN nutrition ON recipe.recipe_id = nutrition.recipe_id
JOIN quantity ON recipe.recipe_id = quantity.recipe_id
WHERE nutrition.calories = 90.22
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.recipe_id FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Quantity AS T3 ON T1.recipe_id = T3.recipe_id WHERE T2.calories = 90.22

records.gold_sql:
SELECT recipe.recipe_id FROM recipe
JOIN nutrition ON recipe.recipe_id = nutrition.recipe_id
JOIN quantity ON recipe.recipe_id = quantity.recipe_id
WHERE nutrition.fiber = 0.13 AND nutrition.calories = 223.05 AND nutrition.pcnt_cal_carb = 12.92 AND recipe.cook_min = 20.0 AND nutrition.protein = 25.62
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.recipe_id FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Nutrition AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Quantity AS T3 ON T1.recipe_id = T3.recipe_id WHERE T2.fiber = 0.13 AND T2.calories = 223.05 AND T2.pcnt_cal_carb = 12.92 AND T1.cook_min = 20 AND T2.protein = 25.62

records.question: Which recipes have a standard minimum of 0.0 and include Mexican products with a minimum quantity of exactly 10.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT recipe.recipe_id FROM recipe
JOIN quantity ON recipe.recipe_id = quantity.recipe_id
JOIN ingredient ON quantity.ingredient_id = ingredient.ingredient_id
WHERE ingredient.category = 'Mexican products' AND recipe.stnd_min = 0.0 AND quantity.min_qty = 10.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.recipe_id FROM Recipe AS T1 INNER JOIN Quantity AS T2 ON T1.recipe_id = T2.recipe_id INNER JOIN Ingredient AS T3 ON T2.ingredient_id = T3.ingredient_id WHERE T1.stnd_min = 0.0 AND T3.category = 'Mexican' AND T2.min_qty = 10.0
